title: myosotis secunda subsp. hirsuta
intro: Myosotis secunda subsp. hirsuta, also known as the hairy forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic actions. The health benefits of M. secunda subsp. hirsuta include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for consumption, and it is also used in herbal medicine to create salves and creams for topical application.
